## Scope

What changed?

## Deviations from plan

None.

## AI assistance

- [ ] No AI-assisted code
- [ ] AI-assisted code present

## Gameplay risk

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Input or controller behavior
- [ ] Player stats, caps, pickups, or weapons
- [ ] Enemy, boss, progression, or drops
- [ ] UI/render/audio behavior
- [ ] Dependency, build, or CI

## Verification

- [ ] npm run lint passes, if code changed
- [ ] npm test passes, if code changed
- [ ] npm run test:proof passes, if mechanics changed
- [ ] npm run build passes, if app changed
- [ ] Browser smoke checked when UI/input changed
- [ ] Reviewer checked silent-failure risk
